titleStmt.title: SII 39.180: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 180. (A.R. No. 180 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-18TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to a previous gift of lands located on the way between Kanchipuram to Uttiramērūr for setting up agrahāram as well as lands donated as bhaṭṭavirutti to Mādhavabhaṭṭaṉ by Perumānāyakkar during the reign period of Vijayagaṇḍagōpāla. It is said that the brāhmaṇas of the village sold those lands for paying tax arrears.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8 mārkaḻi mācam Irupatteḻāntiyati nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu tāmark koṭṭattu tāmal nāṭṭut tiruppati tiruccittirameḻi tiruppukkuḻināyaṉār vijayarāghavap perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam
kaṭṭaṉūr veṟu pirinta puttakaram svāmisandhoṣac caturvetimaṅkalattu mahājaṉamum Ivvūr pūrvasvāmikaḷāṉa brāhmaṇarum vyavasthāpatram paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu nāṅkaḷ vijayakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku 10 7 nāḷile nāyaṉār peruṭaikaḷilp perumāṇāyakkar Eṅkaḷukku
Akaramākat tanta nilam kāñcīpurattukkup pokiṟa peruvaḻikku Uttaramerūr mātavapaṭṭaṉukku nāyakkar paṭṭavirutti viṭṭaniḷamuṭpaṭa mucaṟupākkat tellaikku vaṭakkum kaṭavaḷūr Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum veṅkaṭapāṭi Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum tāmartūṉi kāṭṭuppaṭṭi Ellaikkut teṟkum
kaṭṭaṉūr paḻavakaramāṉa Ammaiyappa caruppetimaṅkalattu Ellaikkut teṟkum Ivvūr Ēriuṭainta maṭuviṟkālukku vaṭakkum puṉṉaiccerivatikku meṟkum Inta Ellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey nilattu Āṟṟaṅkaraiy tevatāṉam kuḻi 2 1000 m tirunantavaṉam kuḻi 2 100 Ērivāy
tevatāṉaṅkuḻi 2 1000 Āka paṉṉiraṇṭaṭikkolāle kuḻi 4 1000 2 100 Itil kaṭamai Oḻiñca poṉvari Uḷḷappaṭṭakkāṉa prāptikaḷum poreṟṟukku Eṅkaḷuṭaṉ Eḻutivuṭaiya paṅku Oṉṟum nikki Eṅkaḷ paṅku 2 10 3(1/2) Itil kāṇiyāḷar paṅku mūṉṟum tiruppukkuḻip paṭṭarkku perumāṇā
yakkar Akarattu bāhmaṇaruṭaṉ kuṭutta paṅku Oṉṟum ṅkaḷ paṅku pattoṉpataraiyum Āka paṅku 2 10 3(1/2)ṉāyum Iṟṟai nāḷile Eṅkaḷukku rājākkaḷ rājamāy vakuppirukka māṭṭāta paṭiyāle viṟpomāka niṉaittom koḷvīruḷirō Eṉṉa sthāṉattār
reṟṟiṉa śrī paṇṭārattu tiruvāparaṇam viṟṟup paṅkoṉṉukku vācipaṭar varākaṉ paṇanūṟākak kaikkoṇṭa paṇam 2 1000 3 100 5 10 Ippaṇam Iraṇṭāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Aimpatum kaikkoṇṭu Akarattu naṉcey puṉcey Ērikkāl Āṟṟukkāl meṉokkiṉa maram
kīḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟu maṟṟuṅ kaṉṟunilai pāḻ Uṭpaṭa Epperppaṭṭaṉavum bhāga bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum Āgāmikaḷum Uṭpaṭa tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka poreṟṟiṉāṉ tirukkaimalarile Utakam paṇṇi piramāṉamum paṇṇi Eṅkaḷ Irupattu mūṉṟaṟaip pereḻuttum Akaraṅkaḷil brahmaṇar
Eḻuttum nāṭṭār Eḻuttum Iṭṭukkuṭuttom Inta svāmisan=toṣac caturvedi maṅkalattu mahākaṉamum kāṇpāṉ brāhmaṇarum Ivvaṉaivom § Iṟṟai nāḷilē Ippaṭikkaṇṭu Eḻuttu veṭṭiṉeṉ taṇṭaka nāṭṭu poruḷācāriyaṉeṉ Eḻuttu camantakaḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
